page_header.label: BATCH PAYMENTS
page_header.title: Pay Many, Privately
page_header.description: Send confidential payments to multiple recipients in a single transaction. Upload a CSV or enter manually — each recipient gets their own private claim link.

paragraphs: "Paying a team of 20 means 20 public transactions, each revealing amounts and recipients."
Traditional batch payments expose everything: who got paid, how much, when, and by whom. Whether it's payroll, grants, or airdrop distributions, every detail becomes public record on the blockchain.

ZKIRA's batch payments maintain complete privacy while streamlining operations. Create multiple escrows in one flow, distribute individual claim links, and let recipients claim privately through stealth addresses.
Batch payments create multiple private escrows in a single transaction, then generate individual claim links for each recipient. No one can see who was paid, how much, or link payments to each other.

items: CSV Upload: Import recipient lists with amounts and optional notes
Sequential Escrow: Create separate escrows for each payment, all in one transaction
Individual Claims: Each recipient gets their own unique, unlinkable claim link

items.title: Upload CSV
items.description: Import recipient data: addresses, amounts, and optional notes. Or enter manually through the interface.

items.title: Preview
items.description: Review recipients, amounts, and total. Verify all details before creating the batch escrows.

items.title: Execute
items.description: Sign one transaction to create all escrows. Each recipient gets their own private escrow account.

items.title: Distribute Links
items.description: Send each recipient their unique claim link via email, Slack, or any channel. Claims are private and unlinkable.

paragraphs: Up to 50 recipients per batch for optimal transaction size and gas efficiency.
Minimal Solana transaction fees, plus 0.25% protocol fee only on successful claims.
Each recipient gets their own unique, private claim link that can't be linked to others.

items.title: DAO Payroll
items.description: Pay contributors monthly without revealing individual compensation amounts. Keep team finances private while maintaining transparency with total budgets.

items.title: Grant Distribution
items.description: Distribute grants to multiple recipients without revealing funding amounts or creating competitive dynamics between grantees.

items.title: Private Airdrops
items.description: Send token distributions that recipients can claim privately. No public record of who received what, when, or how much.

sections.title: Create a Batch Payment
sections.description: Start paying your team, contributors, or community privately. Upload a CSV or enter recipients manually to get started.
